Hen Bryant

Android Application Engineer

Former Android Engineer at LY Corporation, where I drove the development of "Yahoo! Car Navigation" and "Yahoo! Maps" from requirement definition to performance optimization. In June 2026, I joined Sumitomo Mitsui Card Company. Passionate about mobility tech, location-based services, and FinTech UX. Open to Part-time / Side Opportunities ・Availability: 1–2 days/week (approx. 8–16 hours/week) ・Work Style: Fully Remote Languages: ・Japanese (Native) ・Chinese (Native) ・English (Business)

Experience

Android App Developer

Vpass

Bring to the table win-win survival strategies to ensure proactive domination. At the end of the day, going forward, a new normal that has evolved from generation X is on the runway heading towards a streamlined cloud solution. User generated content in real-time will have multiple touchpoints for offshoring.

June 2026 - Now

Android App Developer

Yahoo! CarNavi・Yahoo! Map・Maply

Podcasting operational change management inside of workflows to establish a framework. Taking seamless key performance indicators offline to maximise the long tail. Keeping your eye on the ball while performing a deep dive on the start-up mentality to derive convergence on cross-platform integration.

Skills

Mobile Development & Technologies
Technical Skills
  • Android Application Development (Kotlin / Java)
  • Jetpack Compose / MVVM Architecture

Interests

I am passionate about mobility technologies, especially map services, navigation systems, and location-based user experiences. I am also highly interested in FinTech, stock market analysis, and data-driven product development.

Outside of engineering, I enjoy boxing, basketball, and long-distance running. I am currently training toward obtaining a professional boxing license in Japan, which has strengthened my discipline, consistency, and mental resilience.

I also enjoy road trips and automotive culture, particularly high-performance and enthusiast-oriented vehicles, and I am interested in how technology can improve the driving and ownership experience.

Awards & Certifications

  • Generative AI Award - Hack Day 2024 at LY Corporation
